tips: Cell navigation: click Name Box (~91,184) → Ctrl+A → type cell ref (A2) → Enter
Text input (Linux): use xdotool type --delay 10 "text" (not pyautogui.typewrite)
Numbers: do NOT prefix with apostrophe — 3E+07 is just a narrow column display issue
Save xlsx: Ctrl+S → Enter to confirm Keep Current Format dialog
Close file: Ctrl+W (not Ctrl+Q which quits entire LO)
Sheet reorder: use soffice --headless macro (openpyxl destroys charts)
xclip paste unreliable in LO — always prefer xdotool type
openpyxl sheet default name is Sheet not Sheet1 — set ws.title explicitly
